author.description: Senior Immigration Correspondent for @NewsNation / WSU Murrow College Grad “Go Cougs!” Jesus Follower🙏🏼 Signal: alibradley.13

tweets.text:
🚨#EXCLUSIVE DHS: ICE ARRESTS CONVICTED RAPIST RELEASED TWICE BY OREGON SANCTUARY POLICIES

A Mexican national, previously convicted of rape and sodomy, is back in custody after being released twice from an Oregon county jail.

@ICEgov says Cristobal Felipe-Sarmiento was arrested by Homeland Security Investigations (HSI) in Salem on April 9th. He was convicted in 2016 in Marion County for rape and sodomy—And also has a prior DUI conviction. 

DHS is now blasting sanctuary policies, warning they can put communities at risk by allowing repeat offenders back on the streets.

Acting Assistant Secretary Lauren Bis saying, "This dangerous criminal illegal alien should NEVER have been in this country in the first place -let alone RELEASED TWICE by sanctuary politicians following convictions for driving under the influence, rape, and sodomy. Oregon sanctuary politicians that continue to release criminal illegal aliens like Cristobal Felipe-Sarmiento into American communities are playing Russian roulette with American lives. The brave men and women of DHS law enforcement are working every day to keep our communities safe by arresting these heinous criminals."

Felipe-Sarmiento entered the United States at an unknown date and time—He is now in ICE custody pending removal proceedings.

author.description: Senior Immigration Correspondent for @NewsNation / WSU Murrow College Grad “Go Cougs!” Jesus Follower🙏🏼 Signal: alibradley.13

tweets.text:
.@ICEgov arrests alleged MS-13 associate wanted for aggravated homicide in El Salvador— @DHSgov says Idalia Isabel Morales-Mejia is an illegal immigrant wanted in El Salvador for aggravated homicide and identified as an associate of MS-13 —She was arrested in Northern Virginia.

Authorities say Morales-Mejia was charged in El Salvador back in 2013 and later entered the U.S. illegally at an unknown time and location.

She was located and arrested in Woodbridge after updated intel from El Salvador’s fugitive task force.

“Idalia Isabel Morales-Mejia is not only a known associate of the notorious MS-13 transnational criminal organization, but she apparently attempted to flee justice in her native country by illegally residing in Virginia,” said ICE Washington, D.C. Field Office Director Robert Guadian. “The media would consider her to be a ‘non-criminal’ because she has no known criminal history in the United States — despite the fact that she is facing charges for aggravated homicide in El Salvador. ICE Washington, D.C. will continue to prioritize public safety by arresting and removing criminal alien offenders from our Washington, D.C. and Virginia communities.”

ICE says she is now in custody pending immigration proceedings.
